title: Fix parameter default comparison when value contains type cast (#6281)

features.name: parameter byte cast default
features.description: Code should include a parameter with a type-cast default value where the cast specifies a narrower type than the default int width

features.name: explicit parameter override matching cast default
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class or module instantiation with an explicit parameter value that equals a type-cast default value

features.name: assignment between parameterized instances
features.description: Code should include assignment between two instances of the same parameterized class where one uses default parameters and the other uses explicit parameters

features.name: parameter int cast default
features.description: Code should include a parameter with an int type-cast default value to test width mismatch scenarios

features.name: parameter signed cast default
features.description: Code should include a parameter with a signed type-cast default value to test signed comparison scenarios
